metaDescription: Explore SiteFlow's construction software features covering labour, materials, progress tracking, procurement, subcontractor management and finance — built for contractors in India and the Middle East.
author: SiteFlow Operations Team
body:

Our Specialization

The Complete Construction ERP Software Solution

SiteFlow Construction Management Software is not just another construction ERP software. It is a construction-first platform that simplifies the most complex parts of your project lifecycle. Built to meet the unique needs of the construction industry, SiteFlow helps you take control of every job site with ease. With SiteFlow ERP Software, you get complete control of your construction projects from start to finish.

Track & manage materials with real-time visibility into stock levels, site requests, and supplier balances. Ensure accurate workforce attendance and payroll through GPS tracking & AI-powered face recognition. Simplify subcontractor and vendor management by creating work orders, monitoring progress, and reconciling bills without delays.

Keep your financials in check with automated invoicing, project P&L statements. Unlike generic project management software for construction projects, SiteFlow is built for real-world challenges in the construction and project management space. It combines tools for construction planning, construction scheduling, and construction project tracking software with advanced modules like material procurement, BOQ management, subcontractor management, and labor payroll automation. This all-in-one solution ensures real-time visibility across multiple projects, helping you reduce delays & optimize budgets.

Where Construction Money Leaks and How SiteFlow Stops It

Most construction businesses lose money not on big decisions but on small daily gaps — untracked materials, unverified attendance, delayed billing, and idle equipment. SiteFlow closes every one of these gaps before they become losses.

Stop Material Wastage at the Source

Most sites lose lakhs every year to over-ordering, pilferage, and untracked consumption. SiteFlow gives your team budget-linked material requests, GRN-based delivery tracking, and real-time stock visibility — so every kilogram of material is accounted for from purchase to usage. You know exactly what arrived, what was used, and what is missing before the month ends.

Make Every Labour Hour Count

When attendance runs on paper registers and productivity goes unmeasured, you pay for work that never happened. SiteFlow captures geo-tagged attendance with face recognition, tracks workforce output activity by activity, and calculates wages only against verified data — so your payroll reflects actual work, and your site team stays accountable every single day.

Bill Faster and Collect Without Disputes

Delayed invoices and manual billing errors choke your cash flow and invite client disputes. SiteFlow generates invoices directly from your BOQ and progress data, so every bill reflects only completed work. You track what is billed, what is collected, and what is pending — all in one dashboard — and your finance team stops chasing approvals across WhatsApp.

Track Every Asset Before It Goes Missing

Equipment sitting idle or tools lost between sites drain money silently. SiteFlow assigns every asset to a project or team, tracks operating hours and location, and logs maintenance and repair costs — so you always know where your equipment is, how it is being used, and when it needs attention before a breakdown stalls your site.

Explore Even More Capabilities of Our
Construction Management Software

Beyond daily execution, SiteFlow covers commercial planning, governance, and cross-team control — bringing every construction function into one connected system.

Sales Management

Manage enquiries, tenders, and pre-contract data in one place. Ensure estimates, commitments, and project setup start aligned

BOQ & Estimation

Create, track, and control BOQs across revisions. Keep budgets, quantities, and execution linked from estimation to final billing.

Planning & Budgeting

Define project budgets and execution plans upfront. Track planned vs actual continuously as site data flows in.

Subcontractor Management

Track subcontractor scope, progress, bills, and approvals without spreadsheets or email follow-ups.

Equipment Management

Monitor equipment usage, availability, and fuel consumption across sites to prevent idle costs and leakage.

Quality Management

Centrally plan, monitor, and manage project tasks, work schedules, and implementation progress across all construction sites.

Design & Drawing Management

Centralize drawings, revisions, and site references so teams always work from the latest approved information.

Finance & Accounts

Connect site activity with expenses, payments, and financial records — reducing month-end surprises.

Team & Access Controls

Define role-based access for owners, project managers, engineers, and accounts teams to maintain control without bottlenecks.

FAQs

What plans does SiteFlow offer and what does each include?

SiteFlow offers three plans built for different stages of a construction business. The Business Plan at Rs 12,000 per user per year covers core execution modules including tasks, progress tracking, labour and materials. The Business Plus Plan at Rs 15,000 per user per year adds advanced BOQ, warehouse management, procurement and payroll. The Enterprise Plan starts at Rs 10 lakh and includes unlimited users, custom integrations and white-label options. All plans require a minimum of three users.

Which modules does SiteFlow cover and do I need to use all of them?

SiteFlow covers every stage of construction execution including sales and tendering, design management, planning and budgeting, progress tracking, material and inventory management, labour and salaries, subcontractor management, assets and equipment, procurement, BOQ and billing, quality management, finance and accounts, and team controls. You do not need to activate every module on day one. Most teams start with two or three modules that solve their biggest pain points and expand from there as adoption grows across the business.

How long does it take to get started on SiteFlow?

Most construction companies go live on SiteFlow within 48 hours of onboarding. The setup process covers project creation, team access, role assignments and module configuration. SiteFlow also offers a Managed Service for Rs 15,000 per project per month where a dedicated coordinator handles daily supervisor calls, WhatsApp photo audits and progress reports, making adoption faster even when your site team resists change. Enterprise clients receive custom implementation support based on the scale of their operations.

Can site engineers and supervisors use SiteFlow directly from the field?

Yes. SiteFlow is built mobile-first, meaning every core function works from a smartphone on site. Site engineers update daily progress reports, capture geo-tagged photos with timestamps, mark attendance, raise material requests and flag delays all from the field without needing to return to the office. This eliminates the dependency on WhatsApp for site updates and gives project managers and owners real-time visibility without waiting for end-of-day calls or Excel summaries.

Does SiteFlow work for construction companies in the Middle East as well as India?

SiteFlow serves construction companies across ten plus countries including India and the Middle East. The platform supports the workflows used by contractors, interior fit-out firms, MEP companies and EPC businesses in both markets. Clients in Doha, Dubai, Riyadh and across the Gulf use SiteFlow for subcontractor management, progress tracking and finance controls. The system handles multi-currency operations and adapts to the approval hierarchies and billing structures common in Middle East construction projects.

How does SiteFlow handle data security and role-based access?

SiteFlow gives every company full control over who sees what. Administrators assign roles including site engineer, project manager, accountant and procurement team, and each role carries specific permissions that restrict access to sensitive financial or project data. When an employee leaves or a device is lost, data stays protected within the platform. Every action taken by every user is logged with a timestamp, creating a complete audit trail that protects the business and eliminates data disputes between teams.

Is SiteFlow suitable for companies currently managing everything on Excel and WhatsApp?

SiteFlow is built specifically for construction companies moving away from Excel and WhatsApp. These tools create data silos, delay decisions and offer zero accountability. Your project manager updates a sheet, your site engineer sends photos on WhatsApp, and your owner still has no real picture of what is happening on site. SiteFlow replaces all of this with one connected system where tasks, materials, attendance, approvals and reports flow together automatically, giving every stakeholder the information they need without chasing anyone for updates.
